dj_text: Moving on from Imagine Dragons - Radioactive (Medieval kind of version) to Rolling Stones - Paint It Black (Medieval Instrumental Version). You'll survive. Probably.
commercial_text: Sailors, hoist your spirits high and tune into our latest beacon on air — AHOY!
hijack_text: Boom, welcome aboard Galactic Groove Wave from Paradox Prime
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
